summary: The diff implements the vast majority of the requested requirements. All major frontend components, the backend Motoko actor, i18n translations, LanguageContext, useSubmitLead hook, global CSS, and Tailwind configuration are present. A few minor gaps and one notable deviation were identified.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Hero background image should reference 'hero-bg.jpg' as specified in REQ-4, but the Hero component uses '/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png' with a PNG extension instead of JPG.
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-4 specifies the background image path as frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg and the image spec calls for hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg, but the implementation uses a .png extension.

missing_requirements.requirement: listLeads method returns all leads sorted alphabetically by name
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-1 acceptance criteria explicitly states a method named 'listLeads', but the backend actor exposes this functionality as 'getAllLeadsSortedByName', which does not match the specified method name.

missing_requirements.requirement: Recreate the Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color palettes for navy, gold, and teal, custom border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
missing_requirements.reason: The Tailwind config file is listed among omitted/truncated files and cannot be verified from the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added mapping an old lead schema to the new one.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any migration from a previous schema. It only requests recreating the backend actor with the new lead structure.

hallucinated_features.description: The backend actor includes user profile management methods (getCallerUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile) and a userProfiles stable map.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies lead management methods. User profile CRUD functionality was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: The backend actor integrates AccessControl and BlobStorage mixins, restricting deleteLead, getLead, and getAllLeadsSortedByName to admins only.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies these methods with no mention of access control or admin-only restrictions.

hallucinated_features.description: A URL parameter utility module (frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts) was added with session storage persistence helpers.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request makes no mention of URL parameter utilities or session storage helpers.

hallucinated_features.description: The useActor hook was modified to call actor._initializeAccessControlWithSecret with an admin token extracted from URL parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states not to modify frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, yet the diff shows a modified version of this file with admin token initialization logic.
